query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.externalId ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as assignedBillingItemIds,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.description ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as assignedBillingItemDescs,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.amount ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as assignedBillingItemAmounts
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND (s.planName LIKE '%out%' OR s.planName LIKE '%Out%' OR s.planName LIKE '%SIP%')
  AND s.monthlyCost > s.monthlyRevenue
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY (s.monthlyCost - s.monthlyRevenue) DESC;
